name: P19 Growth Intelligence Layer
intent: Shared knowledge base + 6 typed agents + CMO synthesis for competitive/market intelligence — bounded, audit-only writes.

reuse_strategy.decision: Reuse fn_emit_audit + ops_audit_contract + auto_heal_log as the single audit SSOT — no new audit table.
reuse_strategy.evidence: supabase/migrations/20260523_p19* uses fn_emit_audit and registers 4 contracts in ops_audit_contract.

reuse_strategy.decision: seo_intelligence agent is complementary to the existing SEO pipeline (Cut B/C); it produces insights, never overwrites SEO content nodes.
reuse_strategy.evidence: src/lib/gil/contracts.ts allowedInsightTypes for seo_intelligence is observation-only.

reuse_strategy.decision: Extend has_role gate + service_role RPC pattern (cf. P18 Cut 2/3, lane-health RPC).
reuse_strategy.evidence: supabase migration GRANT/REVOKE matches established pattern.

explicit_no_go: Autonomous schema/code mutation by any GIL agent
Client-side AI calls (only via executive-agent edge function with service_role)
tests: src/lib/gil/__tests__/contracts.test.ts (contracts, pipeline stages, act whitelist, manifest)
